name: Lemon Ice-Box Pie (for Non-Weight Watchers)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Lemon drop hard candies - finely crushed
recipeInstructions:
For crust: Mix cookie crumbs, ground almonds, butter, sugar and heavy cream together. Pat into the bottom and up the sides of a nine-inch pie pan. Bake at 300°F for 15 minutes. Set aside to cool.
For filling: Mix powdered sugar, softened cream cheese, sour cream and whipped topping until smooth and creamy. Spread over the bottom of the cooled crust. Mix lemon pudding and pie mix according to package directions, milk, lemon juice and grated lemon rind. Spread over the cream cheese layer in the crust. Refrigerate for one hour.
For topping: Spread whipped topping over the top of the pie and sprinkle with finely crushed lemon candies. Refrigerate.
